# Generated by tools/m9_diplomacy.py --write; M9 ancient casus belli.
# Fields are limited to local 1.3.1.1 CB contracts; dates use AntqDate.

antq_punitive_expedition = {
	years = 10
	create_visible = { scope:target = { is_neighbor_of = root } }
	create_enabled = { not = { has_truce_with = scope:target } }
	war_goal_type = antq_punitive_superiority
	ai_will_do = {
		add = {
			desc = "BASE"
			value = 10
		}
	}
}

antq_impose_client_king = {
	years = 15
	create_visible = { scope:target = { subject_type_is_not_locked = yes } }
	create_enabled = {
		not = { has_truce_with = scope:target }
		country_rank_level >= scope:target.country_rank_level
		scope:target = {
			can_make_subject_of = {
				target = root
				type = subject_type:antq_client_kingdom
				ignore_war_limitation = yes
			}
		}
		peace_treaty_war_score_cost = {
			peace_treaty = peace_treaty:antq_treaty_impose_client_king
			loser = scope:target
			value <= 100
		}
	}
	war_goal_type = antq_client_capital
	ai_will_do = {
		add = {
			desc = "BASE"
			value = 8
		}
	}
}

antq_demand_tribute = {
	years = 15
	create_visible = { scope:target = { subject_type_is_not_locked = yes } }
	create_enabled = {
		not = { has_truce_with = scope:target }
		country_rank_level >= scope:target.country_rank_level
		scope:target = {
			can_make_subject_of = {
				target = root
				type = subject_type:antq_tributary
				ignore_war_limitation = yes
			}
		}
		peace_treaty_war_score_cost = {
			peace_treaty = peace_treaty:antq_treaty_demand_tribute
			loser = scope:target
			value <= 100
		}
	}
	war_goal_type = antq_tribute_capital
	ai_will_do = {
		add = {
			desc = "BASE"
			value = 7
		}
	}
}

antq_frontier_rectification = {
	years = 15
	create_visible = { scope:target = { any_owned_location = { is_core_of = root } } }
	create_enabled = { not = { has_truce_with = scope:target } }
	province = { any_location_in_province = { is_core_of = scope:actor } }
	war_goal_type = antq_frontier_recovery
	ai_will_do = {
		add = {
			desc = "BASE"
			value = 16
		}
	}
}

antq_loot_raid = {
	years = 5
	create_visible = {
		OR = {
			government_type = government_type:tribe
			government_type = government_type:steppe_horde
		}
		scope:target = { is_neighbor_of = root }
	}
	create_enabled = { not = { has_truce_with = scope:target } }
	war_goal_type = antq_raid_superiority
	ai_will_do = {
		add = {
			desc = "BASE"
			value = 14
		}
	}
}

antq_succession_intervention = {
	years = 10
	create_visible = {
		government_type = government_type:monarchy
		scope:target = { government_type = government_type:monarchy }
	}
	create_enabled = { not = { has_truce_with = scope:target } }
	war_goal_type = antq_succession_capital
	ai_will_do = {
		add = {
			desc = "BASE"
			value = 6
		}
	}
}

antq_holy_suppression = {
	years = 10
	create_visible = { current_date >= 325.1.1 religion != scope:target.religion }
	create_enabled = { current_date >= 325.1.1 not = { has_truce_with = scope:target } }
	war_goal_type = antq_holy_superiority
	ai_will_do = {
		add = {
			desc = "BASE"
			value = 4
		}
	}
}

antq_chinese_warlord_unification = {
	create_visible = { always = no }
	create_enabled = { always = no }
	war_goal_type = antq_unification_superiority
	ai_will_do = { value = -1 }
}

	create_visible = { always = no }
	create_enabled = { always = no }
	war_goal_type = antq_unification_superiority
	ai_will_do = { value = -1 }
}

	create_visible = { always = no }
	create_enabled = { always = no }
	war_goal_type = antq_unification_superiority
	ai_will_do = { value = -1 }
